model.name: Driver Drowsiness & Foul Activity Detection
model.description: Monitors driver state using IR cameras. Extracts EAR, PERCLOS, yawning, and head pose to detect fatigue and phone usage, replacing the legacy EAR function.

model.name: Passenger Incident Detection
model.description: Utilizes YOLOv9 and 3D semantic tracking paired with multimodal audio-visual data to accurately detect falls, fights, and medical emergencies.

model.name: Multi-Sensor Crash Detection
model.description: Fuses IMU, GPS, and pressure sensors with a lightweight Naïve Bayes classifier to detect impacts with sub-50ms latency.
